1758	/-- **Lemma 7 (assembly via direct images).** [Nitsure §4 assembly step]
1759	
1760	For `S` noetherian and `𝓕` coherent on a proper `π : X ⟶ S`, there
1761	exists an integer `N` such that iterating the `n=0` stratification
1762	(Lemma 5) on the direct images `E_i := π_*𝓕(N+i)` on `S`
1763	(`i = 0, 1, …`) produces, after finitely many refinements, the
1764	Hilbert-polynomial-indexed stratification of the main theorem.
1765	
1766	The substantive content is the existence of the uniform vanishing
1767	bound `N` together with the finite refinement chain producing the
1768	locally-closed strata `S_f` from the rank-strata `W_{e_0, …, e_n}`.
1769	
1770	For the iter-176 file-skeleton this is encoded by the existence of a
1771	finite locally-closed stratification refining Lemma 6, together with
1772	the assertion that the strata carry constant Hilbert polynomial (the
1773	"polynomial-locally-constant" content of Nitsure's statement (A)).
1774	The Hilbert polynomial itself is encoded abstractly as a function
1775	`I → (ℕ → ℤ)` (each numerical polynomial restricted to `ℕ`); the
1776	substantive refinement to `numericalPolynomial` of degree `≤ n` is
1777	iter-177+ work.
1778	
1779	Proof status (run 0010, T12 r2): as typed, the `P`-conjunct only demands
1780	*some* injection `I → (ℕ → ℤ)`, which any finite index type admits; the
1781	statement is therefore a formal corollary of `flatLocusReduction`, and is
1782	proved as such below. The genuinely-Hilbert-indexed refinement must
1783	strengthen the statement (tie `P f` to fibre Euler characteristics), which
1784	awaits the coherent-χ substrate. -/
1785	lemma flatLocusAssembly {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1786	    (π : X ⟶ S) [IsProper π] (F : X.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1787	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (S_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, S_ f ⟶ S)
1788	      (P : I → ℕ → ℤ),
1789	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
1790	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
1791	      (∀ s : S, ∃ f, s ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
1792	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (ι f))
1793	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (ι f))).obj F)) ∧
1794	      (∀ f g, f = g ↔ P f = P g) := by
1795	  obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, himm, hdisj, hcov, hflat⟩ := flatLocusReduction π F
1796	  haveI := hI
1797	  haveI := Fintype.ofFinite I
1798	  refine ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, fun i _ => ((Fintype.equivFin I) i : ℤ), himm, hdisj, hcov, hflat,
1799	    fun f g => ⟨fun h => h ▸ rfl, fun h => ?_⟩⟩
1800	  have h0 : (((Fintype.equivFin I) f : ℕ) : ℤ) = (((Fintype.equivFin I) g : ℕ) : ℤ) :=
1801	    congrFun h 0
1802	  exact (Fintype.equivFin I).injective (Fin.val_injective (by exact_mod_cast h0))
1803	
1804	/-- **Flattening stratification existence theorem** [Nitsure §4 main /
1805	Stacks 052H].

text: Now the `flatLocusStratification` producer that converts to `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 ...)`.

data.content:
1804	/-- **Flattening stratification existence theorem** [Nitsure §4 main /
1805	Stacks 052H].
1806	
1807	For a noetherian scheme `S`, a proper morphism `π : X ⟶ S`, and a
1808	coherent `𝓞_X`-module `𝓕`, there exists a finite locally-closed
1809	stratification `{S_f}` of `S` indexed by a finite set `I` such that
1810	- each `ι : S_f ⟶ S` is a (locally-closed) immersion;
1811	- the underlying sets `|S_f|` partition `|S|` (disjoint and covering);
1812	- the pullback `𝓕|_{X ×_S S_f}` is flat over `S_f` for each `f`.
1813	
1814	The (intended) substantive refinement is that the index set `I` is in
1815	bijection with the set of Hilbert polynomials arising on fibres, and
1816	that each `S_f` is uniquely determined by its Hilbert polynomial. For
1817	the iter-176 file-skeleton the substantive type captures the
1818	stratification + flatness; the Hilbert-polynomial labeling is encoded
1819	in `flatLocusAssembly`'s `P : I → ℕ → ℤ` injection but elided here for
1820	type-clarity.
1821	
1822	Proof status (run 0010, T12 r2): the conclusion as typed is exactly the
1823	conclusion of `flatLocusReduction` (Lemma 6) up to conjunct order, so the
1824	theorem is proved below by that reduction; the remaining mathematical
1825	content of this cone therefore lives in `flatLocusReduction` (Noetherian
1826	induction on `genericFlatness`) and `genericFlatness` itself. The
1827	Hilbert-polynomial-indexed refinement (which would need relative
1828	projective space `ℙⁿ_S`, Castelnuovo–Mumford regularity, direct-image
1829	base change 02KH) is deliberately not part of this statement; see
1830	`flatLocusAssembly` and the blueprint chapter §`Mathlib status`. -/
1831	theorem flatteningStratification {S X : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1832	    (π : X ⟶ S) [IsProper π] (F : X.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1833	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (S_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, S_ f ⟶ S),
1834	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
1835	      (∀ s : S, ∃ f, s ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
1836	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
1837	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π (ι f))
1838	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π (ι f))).obj F)) := by
1839	  obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, himm, hdisj, hcov, hflat⟩ := flatLocusReduction π F
1840	  exact ⟨I, hI, V_, ι, himm, hcov, hdisj, hflat⟩
1841	
1842	/-- **Lemma 5 (special case `n = 0`).** [Nitsure §4 special case]
1843	
1844	For `S` noetherian and `𝓕` a coherent `𝓞_S`-module, there exists a
1845	countable family `S_e ⊆ S` (indexed by `e ∈ ℕ`) of locally-closed
1846	subschemes such that
1847	- each `S_e ⟶ S` is a (locally-closed) immersion;
1848	- the underlying sets `|S_e|` partition `|S|`;
1849	- the pullback `𝓕|_{S_e}` is flat over `𝓞_{S_e}` — encoded as
1850	  `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ e))`, i.e. flatness of the section modules of
1851	  the pulled-back sheaf over the section rings of the stratum *itself*.
1852	  (The *rank*-`e` locally-free refinement is future work once the
1853	  locally-free-of-rank-`e` predicate is in scope.)
1854	
1855	Statement repair (run 0010, T12 r2): the former conclusion asserted
1856	`CoherentSheafFlat (ι e)` — flatness of the pulled-back sheaf over the
1857	*ambient* `S` via the immersion — which is FALSE for any non-open stratum
1858	(the rank stratification of the skyscraper `k(0)` on `𝔸¹` refutes it);
1859	Nitsure's content is flatness (indeed local freeness) over the stratum,
1860	which is `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ e))`.
1861	
1862	Statement repair (run 0010, T12 r7): hypothesis strengthened from
1863	`IsLocallyNoetherian` to `IsNoetherian`, matching the standing noetherian
1864	assumption of [Nitsure] §4.  With the rank-`e` labeling dropped (previous
1865	repair) the strata are no longer canonical, so the gluing argument that
1866	would extend the ℕ-indexed statement to a merely locally noetherian base
1867	(canonical rank strata glue over any affine cover) is not available to this
1868	statement; the noetherian form is what the `AJC.picrep` cone consumes.
1869	
1870	Proof (run 0010, T12 r7): from the existence theorem
1871	`flatteningStratification` applied to `π = 𝟙 S`.  The finitely many strata
1872	`V_f` are re-indexed over `ℕ` via `Fintype.equivFin`, with the *pullback
1873	scheme* `(𝟙 S) ×_S V_f` itself as stratum and `pullback.fst` as the
1874	immersion (equal to `pullback.snd ≫ ι f` with `pullback.snd` an
1875	isomorphism, since `𝟙 S` is), padded by the empty scheme for indices
1876	`≥ card I`.  Flatness over the stratum transports from the conclusion of
1877	`flatteningStratification` by `coherentSheafFlat_of_comp_isIso`, and over
1878	the empty scheme every section module is flat (the section rings are
1879	trivial). -/
1880	lemma flatLocusStratification {S : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
1881	    (F : S.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
1882	    ∃ (S_ : ℕ → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ e, S_ e ⟶ S),
1883	      (∀ e, IsImmersion (ι e)) ∧
1884	      (∀ e e', e ≠ e' → Disjoint (Set.range (ι e).base) (Set.range (ι e').base)) ∧
1885	      (∀ s : S, ∃ e, s ∈ Set.range (ι e).base) ∧
1886	      (∀ e, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ e))
1887	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (ι e)).obj F)) := by
1888	  classical
1889	  haveI : IsProper (𝟙 S) := MorphismProperty.id_mem _ S
1890	  obtain ⟨I, hI, V_, ι₀, himm, hcov, hdisj, hflat⟩ := flatteningStratification (𝟙 S) F
1891	  haveI := hI
1892	  haveI := Fintype.ofFinite I
1893	  let eqv := Fintype.equivFin I
1894	  -- the first projection is the composition of the iso `pullback.snd` with `ι₀`
1895	  have hfst : ∀ i : I,
1896	      pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i) = pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i) ≫ ι₀ i := fun i => by
1897	    simpa using pullback.condition (f := 𝟙 S) (g := ι₀ i)
1898	  have hrange : ∀ i : I,
1899	      Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i)).base = Set.range (ι₀ i).base := by
1900	    intro i
1901	    have hsurj : Function.Surjective (pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i)).base :=
1902	      (ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ i)).base).2
1903	    rw [hfst i]
1904	    simp only [Scheme.Hom.comp_base, TopCat.coe_comp, Set.range_comp]
1905	    rw [hsurj.range_eq, Set.image_univ]
1906	  -- reindex the finite strata over `ℕ`, padding with the empty scheme
1907	  let P : ℕ → Σ X : Scheme.{u}, X ⟶ S := fun e =>
1908	    if h : e < Fintype.card I then
1909	      ⟨pullback (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)),
1910	        pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))⟩
1911	    else ⟨∅, Scheme.emptyTo S⟩
1912	  -- the branch values of `P`, as equalities of the full dependent pair (the
1913	  -- `dite` cannot be reduced under the projections: the motive would not be
1914	  -- type-correct)
1915	  have hPpos : ∀ (e : ℕ) (h : e < Fintype.card I),
1916	      P e = ⟨pullback (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)),
1917	        pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))⟩ := fun e h => dif_pos h
1918	  have hPneg : ∀ (e : ℕ), ¬ e < Fintype.card I →
1919	      P e = ⟨∅, Scheme.emptyTo S⟩ := fun e h => dif_neg h
1920	  refine ⟨fun e => (P e).1, fun e => (P e).2, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
1921	  · -- immersions
1922	    intro e
1923	    change IsImmersion (P e).2
1924	    by_cases h : e < Fintype.card I
1925	    · rw [hPpos e h]
1926	      change IsImmersion (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)))
1927	      haveI := himm (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)
1928	      rw [hfst (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)]
1929	      infer_instance
1930	    · rw [hPneg e h]
1931	      change IsImmersion (Scheme.emptyTo S)
1932	      infer_instance
1933	  · -- disjoint ranges
1934	    intro e e' hne
1935	    change Disjoint (Set.range (P e).2.base) (Set.range (P e').2.base)
1936	    by_cases h : e < Fintype.card I
1937	    · by_cases h' : e' < Fintype.card I
1938	      · rw [hPpos e h, hPpos e' h']
1939	        change Disjoint
1940	          (Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))).base)
1941	          (Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e', h'⟩))).base)
1942	        rw [hrange _, hrange _]
1943	        refine hdisj _ _ fun hcontra => hne ?_
1944	        have h2 := congrArg eqv hcontra
1945	        rw [Equiv.apply_symm_apply, Equiv.apply_symm_apply] at h2
1946	        exact congrArg Fin.val h2
1947	      · rw [hPneg e' h']
1948	        change Disjoint (Set.range (P e).2.base) (Set.range (Scheme.emptyTo S).base)
1949	        rw [Set.range_eq_empty (Scheme.emptyTo S).base]
1950	        exact Set.disjoint_empty _
1951	    · rw [hPneg e h]
1952	      change Disjoint (Set.range (Scheme.emptyTo S).base) (Set.range (P e').2.base)
1953	      rw [Set.range_eq_empty (Scheme.emptyTo S).base]
1954	      exact Set.empty_disjoint _
1955	  · -- covering
1956	    intro s
1957	    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := hcov s
1958	    refine ⟨(eqv f : ℕ), ?_⟩
1959	    change s ∈ Set.range (P ((eqv f : Fin _) : ℕ)).2.base
1960	    have hlt : ((eqv f : Fin _) : ℕ) < Fintype.card I := (eqv f).isLt
1961	    rw [hPpos _ hlt]
1962	    change s ∈ Set.range (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨((eqv f : Fin _) : ℕ), hlt⟩))).base
1963	    rw [hrange _]
1964	    have heq : eqv.symm ⟨((eqv f : Fin _) : ℕ), hlt⟩ = f := by
1965	      simp
1966	    rw [heq]
1967	    exact hf
1968	  · -- flatness over each stratum
1969	    intro e
1970	    change Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (P e).1)
1971	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (P e).2).obj F)
1972	    obtain h | h := Nat.lt_or_ge e (Fintype.card I)
1973	    · rw [hPpos e h]
1974	      change Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat
1975	        (𝟙 (pullback (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))))
1976	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)))).obj F)
1977	      refine coherentSheafFlat_of_comp_isIso
1978	        (𝟙 (pullback (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩))))
1979	        (pullback.snd (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)))
1980	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst (𝟙 S) (ι₀ (eqv.symm ⟨e, h⟩)))).obj F) ?_
1981	      rw [Category.id_comp]
1982	      exact hflat _
1983	    · rw [hPneg e (not_lt.mpr h)]
1984	      change Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (∅ : Scheme.{u}))
1985	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (Scheme.emptyTo S)).obj F)
1986	      intro U hU V hV eV
1987	      haveI : Subsingleton Γ((∅ : Scheme.{u}), U) :=
1988	        inferInstanceAs (Subsingleton PUnit)
1989	      letI : Module Γ((∅ : Scheme.{u}), U)
1990	          Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (Scheme.emptyTo S)).obj F, V) :=
1991	        Module.compHom _ (Scheme.Hom.appLE (𝟙 (∅ : Scheme.{u})) U V eV).hom
1992	      haveI := Module.Free.of_subsingleton' Γ((∅ : Scheme.{u}), U)
1993	        Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (Scheme.emptyTo S)).obj F, V)
1994	      infer_instance
1995	
1996	/-! The **universal property of the flat-locus stratification**
1997	(`AlgebraicGeometry.flatLocusStratification_universal`, [Nitsure §4,
1998	special case `n = 0`, parts (i) + (ii)]) is stated and proved in
1999	`AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.FlatteningStratificationUniversal`: its proof
2000	consumes the canonical rank strata of
2001	`AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.EntryIdealStratum`, which this file does not
2002	import.  The statement-repair history (specialization to `π = 𝟙 S`, run
2003	0010 T12 r7) is recorded in the docstring there. -/
2004	
2005	/-- **Flattening stratification for a coherent sheaf on a relative
2006	curve** [Nitsure §4 corollary; Route~A consumer A.2.a entry-point].
2007	
2008	Let `k` be a field, `C` a smooth proper curve over `k` (encoded as
2009	`C : Over (Spec k)` with `[SmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 C.hom]` and
2010	`[IsProper C.hom]`), and `T` a noetherian `k`-scheme. For any coherent
2011	sheaf `𝓕` on the relative curve `C ×_k T`, the flattening
2012	stratification conclusion of `flatteningStratification` applies to
2013	`π = pr_T : C ×_k T → T` and `𝓕`: there is a finite locally-closed
2014	stratification `{T_f ⊆ T}` set-theoretically covering `T` disjointly,
2015	such that `𝓕|_{C ×_k T_f}` is flat over `T_f` for each `f`.
2016	
2017	The body invokes `flatteningStratification` on the base-changed
2018	morphism `pullback.snd C.hom T.hom : (C ×_k T) ⟶ T`, using that
2019	`IsProper (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom)` holds by base change of
2020	`IsProper C.hom`; hence this corollary is proved (no `sorry`). -/
2021	theorem flatteningStratification.ofCurve {k : Type u} [Field k]
2022	    (C : Over (Spec (.of k)))
2023	    [SmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 C.hom] [IsProper C.hom]
2024	    (T : Over (Spec (.of k))) [IsNoetherian T.left]
2025	    (F : (Limits.pullback C.hom T.hom).Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
2026	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (T_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, T_ f ⟶ T.left),
2027	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
2028	      (∀ t : T.left, ∃ f, t ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
2029	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
2030	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat
2031	        (pullback.snd (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom) (ι f))
2032	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback
2033	          (pullback.fst (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom) (ι f))).obj F)) :=
2034	  flatteningStratification (pullback.snd C.hom T.hom) F
2035	
2036	end AlgebraicGeometry
2037

405	    exact Modules.pullbackSlicePresentation_isFinite g F _ _
406	  exact { exists_quasicoherentData := ⟨q'.shrink, hfin⟩ }
407	
408	/-- **Flatness over the base is stable under base change** (Stacks 01U9,
409	lifted to the coherent-sheaf flatness predicate `Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat`
410	along a cartesian square).  Affine-locally this is `Module.Flat.baseChange`
411	threaded through the quasi-coherent section calculus: the stalk of `g'^* F`
412	is the base change of the stalk of `F`, and the affine-pair predicate is
413	stalk-local for quasi-coherent modules (Stacks 00HT). -/
414	theorem CoherentSheafFlat.of_isPullback
415	    {X S X' S' : Scheme.{u}} {f : X ⟶ S} {g : S' ⟶ S} {g' : X' ⟶ X} {f' : X' ⟶ S'}
416	    (sq : IsPullback g' f' f g) (F : X.Modules) (hqc : F.IsQuasicoherent)
417	    (hF : CoherentSheafFlat f F) :
418	    CoherentSheafFlat f' ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g').obj F) := by
419	  sorry
420	
421	/-- **Proper support is stable under base change** (Nitsure §1; Stacks 01W4 +
422	056H).  For a finitely presented `F`, the annihilator of `g'^* F` contains
423	the pullback of the annihilator of `F`, so the schematic support of `g'^* F`
424	factors through the base change of the schematic support of `F` by a closed
425	immersion; properness is stable under base change and under precomposition
426	with closed immersions. -/
427	theorem Modules.HasProperSupport.of_isPullback
428	    {X S X' S' : Scheme.{u}} {f : X ⟶ S} {g : S' ⟶ S} {g' : X' ⟶ X} {f' : X' ⟶ S'}
429	    (sq : IsPullback g' f' f g) (F : X.Modules) (hfp : F.IsFinitePresentation)
430	    (hF : Modules.HasProperSupport f F) :
431	    Modules.HasProperSupport f' ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g').obj F) := by
432	  sorry
433	
434	/-- **The fibrewise graded Hilbert function is invariant under base change**
435	(Nitsure §1, the implicit invariance behind the decomposition
436	`Quot = ∐_Φ Quot^Φ`).  For `t' : T'` over `t := ψ(t')`, the fibre of
437	`X_{T'} → T'` at `t'` is the base change of the fibre of `X_T → T` at `t`
438	along the residue extension `κ(t) → κ(t')` (`quotBaseSquare` pasting), and
439	`H⁰` of the twists of a finitely presented module with proper support
440	commutes with base field extension (flat base change over a field, Stacks
441	02KH), so the `κ`-dimensions agree.  Quasi-coherence of the twisting module
442	`L` is required for the flat-base-change step (for an arbitrary sheaf of
443	modules the statement can fail), matching the line-bundle `L` of
444	`def:quot_functor`. -/
445	theorem hilbertFunction_quotBaseMap (π : X ⟶ S) (L : X.Modules)
446	    [L.IsQuasicoherent]
447	    {T T' : Over S} (ψ : T' ⟶ T) (F : (Limits.pullback π T.hom).Modules)
448	    (hfp : F.IsFinitePresentation)
449	    (hps : Modules.HasProperSupport (pullback.snd π T.hom) F)
450	    (t' : (T'.left : Scheme.{u})) (m : ℕ) :
451	    hilbertFunction (pullback.snd π T'.hom)
452	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π T'.hom)).obj L)
453	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (quotBaseMap π ψ)).obj F) t' m
454	      = hilbertFunction (pullback.snd π T.hom)
455	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π T.hom)).obj L) F
456	        (ψ.left.base t') m := by
457	  sorry
458	
459	/-! ## §3. Families of quotients and the Quot functor -/
460	
461	section QuotFunctor
462	
463	variable [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
464	
465	/-- A **family of quotients of `E` parametrised by `T`** with Hilbert
466	polynomial `Φ` (Nitsure §1; the unbundled datum whose equivalence classes
467	form the value of the Quot functor `def:quot_functor` at `T`):
468	
469	* a finitely presented sheaf of modules `F` on the relative product
470	  `X_T = X ×_S T` (the coherence encoding of the flattening-stratification
471	  input; over the locally noetherian regime finite presentation ⟺
472	  coherence), flat over `T` and with schematic support proper over `T`;
473	* an epimorphism `q : E_T ⟶ F` from the pullback of `E` along the first
474	  projection;
475	* at every point `t : T`, the graded Hilbert function
476	  `m ↦ dim_{κ(t)} Γ((X_T)_t, F_t ⊗ L_t^{⊗m})` eventually agrees with `Φ` —
477	  by `Scheme.hilbertPolynomial_eq_of_eventually` this says exactly that the
478	  Hilbert polynomial of `F|_{X_t}` relative to `L|_{X_t}`
479	  (`def:hilbert_polynomial`) *is* `Φ`, and it excludes the junk-value
480	  coincidence when no polynomial matches. -/
481	structure QuotFamily (π : X ⟶ S) [LocallyOfFiniteType π] (L E : X.Modules)
482	    (Φ : Polynomial ℚ) (T : Over S) : Type (u + 1) where
483	  /-- The quotient sheaf on the relative product `X ×_S T`. -/
484	  F : (Limits.pullback π T.hom).Modules
485	  /-- `F` is finitely presented (coherent, in the locally noetherian regime). -/
486	  isFinitePresentation : F.IsFinitePresentation
487	  /-- `F` is flat over `T`. -/
488	  flat : CoherentSheafFlat (pullback.snd π T.hom) F
489	  /-- The schematic support of `F` is proper over `T`. -/
490	  properSupport : Modules.HasProperSupport (pullback.snd π T.hom) F
491	  /-- The quotient map from the pullback of `E`. -/
492	  q : (Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π T.hom)).obj E ⟶ F
493	  /-- The quotient map is an epimorphism. -/
494	  epi : Epi q
495	  /-- At every `t : T`, the graded Hilbert function of the fibre of `F`
496	  twisted by `L` eventually agrees with `Φ`. -/
497	  hilb : ∀ t : (T.left : Scheme.{u}), ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ m : ℕ, N < m →
498	    Φ.eval (m : ℚ) = (hilbertFunction (pullback.snd π T.hom)
499	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (pullback.fst π T.hom)).obj L) F t m : ℚ)
500	
501	namespace QuotFamily
502	
503	variable {π : X ⟶ S} [LocallyOfFiniteType π] {L E : X.Modules} {Φ : Polynomial ℚ}
504	
505	/- The quasi-coherence of the twisting module `L` (part of the line-bundle
506	hypothesis of `def:quot_functor`) enters only through the base-change
507	invariance of the fibrewise Hilbert function
508	(`Scheme.hilbertFunction_quotBaseMap`), i.e. through the pullback action. -/
509	
510	/-- Two families of quotients are **equivalent** when an isomorphism of the
511	target sheaves commutes with the quotient maps — equivalently, when
512	`ker q = ker q'` (`def:quot_functor`; same convention as the merged absolute
513	Grassmannian `RankQuotient.Rel`). -/
514	def Rel {T : Over S} (x y : QuotFamily π L E Φ T) : Prop :=
515	  ∃ f : x.F ≅ y.F, x.q ≫ f.hom = y.q
516	
517	lemma rel_refl {T : Over S} (x : QuotFamily π L E Φ T) : x.Rel x :=
518	  ⟨Iso.refl _, Category.comp_id _⟩
519	
520	lemma rel_symm {T : Over S} {x y : QuotFamily π L E Φ T} (h : x.Rel y) : y.Rel x := by
521	  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
522	  exact ⟨f.symm, by rw [Iso.symm_hom, Iso.comp_inv_eq]; exact hf.symm⟩
523	
524	lemma rel_trans {T : Over S} {x y z : QuotFamily π L E Φ T}
525	    (h1 : x.Rel y) (h2 : y.Rel z) : x.Rel z := by
526	  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h1; obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := h2
527	  exact ⟨f ≪≫ g,
528	    (congrArg (x.q ≫ ·) (Iso.trans_hom f g)).trans <|
529	      (Category.assoc x.q f.hom g.hom).symm.trans <|
530	        (congrArg (· ≫ g.hom) hf).trans hg⟩
531	
532	/-- The equivalence-of-families setoid. -/
533	instance setoid (π : X ⟶ S) [LocallyOfFiniteType π] (L E : X.Modules)
534	    (Φ : Polynomial ℚ) (T : Over S) : Setoid (QuotFamily π L E Φ T) where
535	  r := Rel
536	  iseqv := ⟨rel_refl, rel_symm, rel_trans⟩
537	
538	/-- The **pullback action** on a family of quotients along `ψ : T' ⟶ T` of
539	`Over S`: pull the sheaf and the quotient map back along
540	`quotBaseMap π ψ : X_{T'} ⟶ X_T`, matching the `E`-side through
541	`pullbackTriangleIso (quotBaseMap_fst π ψ)`.  Well-definedness of the four
542	conditions is the content of §2. -/
543	noncomputable def pullbackAlong [L.IsQuasicoherent] {T T' : Over S} (ψ : T' ⟶ T)
544	    (x : QuotFamily π L E Φ T) : QuotFamily π L E Φ T' where
545	  F := (Scheme.Modules.pullback (quotBaseMap π ψ)).obj x.F
546	  isFinitePresentation :=
547	    Modules.pullback_isFinitePresentation _ x.F x.isFinitePresentation
548	  flat := fun {U} hU {V} hV e =>
549	    CoherentSheafFlat.of_isPullback (quotBaseSquare π ψ) x.F
550	      (letI := x.isFinitePresentation; inferInstance) x.flat hU hV e
551	  properSupport :=
552	    Modules.HasProperSupport.of_isPullback (quotBaseSquare π ψ) x.F
553	      x.isFinitePresentation x.properSupport
554	  q := (pullbackTriangleIso (quotBaseMap_fst π ψ) E).inv ≫

150	private lemma id_appLE_apply {W : T.Opens}
151	    (e : W ≤ (𝟙 T : T ⟶ T) ⁻¹ᵁ W) (r : Γ(T, W)) :
152	    ((𝟙 T : T ⟶ T).appLE W W e).hom r = r := by
153	  rw [Scheme.id_appLE]
154	  exact presheaf_map_self (X := T) e r
155	
156	/-- **Extraction of section flatness from flatness over the identity**: if
157	`G` is flat over `T` via `𝟙 T` (the encoding of "the coherent sheaf `G` is
158	flat" in `Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat`), then the sections over every affine
159	open form a flat module over the section ring. -/
160	theorem flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id {G : T.Modules}
161	    (h : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T) G) {W : T.Opens}
162	    (hW : IsAffineOpen W) : Module.Flat Γ(T, W) Γ(G, W) :=
163	  (flat_compHom_congr ((𝟙 T : T ⟶ T).appLE W W (le_refl W)).hom
164	    (id_appLE_apply _)).mp (h hW hW (le_refl W))
165	
166	/-- **Flatness over the identity from an affine cover of flat sections**:
167	if the sections of `G` over each member of an affine open cover of `T` are
168	flat over the respective section rings, then `G` is flat over `T` via
169	`𝟙 T`. -/
170	theorem coherentSheafFlat_id_of_charts (G : T.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
171	    {ι : Type u} (Wc : ι → T.Opens) (hWc : ∀ j, IsAffineOpen (Wc j))
172	    (hcover : ∀ y : T, ∃ j, y ∈ Wc j)
173	    (hflat : ∀ j, Module.Flat Γ(T, Wc j) Γ(G, Wc j)) :
174	    Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T) G := by
175	  intro U hU V hV eV
176	  exact flat_section_of_affine_cover (𝟙 T) G Wc hWc Wc hWc
177	    (fun j => le_refl _) hcover
178	    (fun j => (flat_compHom_congr
179	      ((𝟙 T : T ⟶ T).appLE (Wc j) (Wc j) (le_refl _)).hom
180	      (id_appLE_apply _)).mpr (hflat j)) hU hV eV
181	
182	end FlatBridge
183	
184	/-! ## §2 The rank dictionary -/
185	
186	section RankDictionary
187	
188	variable {T : Scheme.{u}} (G : T.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
189	
190	/-- A prime of the section ring of an affine open is the prime ideal of
191	the corresponding point. -/
192	private lemma primeIdealOf_fromSpec {W : T.Opens} (hW : IsAffineOpen W)
193	    (p : PrimeSpectrum Γ(T, W)) (hmem : (hW.fromSpec p : T) ∈ W) :
194	    hW.primeIdealOf ⟨hW.fromSpec p, hmem⟩ = p := by
195	  have hinj : Function.Injective hW.fromSpec :=
196	    hW.fromSpec.isOpenEmbedding.injective
197	  exact hinj (by rw [hW.fromSpec_primeIdealOf])
198	
199	/-- **The stalk rank of an affine section module computes the point rank**:
200	for a quasi-coherent `G` with flat, finite sections `Γ(G, W)` over an
201	affine `W`, the rank of `Γ(G, W)` at a prime `p` is the point rank of `G`
202	at the corresponding point `fromSpec p` [Nitsure §4: flatness plus finite
203	presentation make the fibre dimension compute the local rank]. -/
204	theorem rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank {W : T.Opens}
205	    (hW : IsAffineOpen W) [Module.Flat Γ(T, W) Γ(G, W)]
206	    [Module.Finite Γ(T, W) Γ(G, W)] (p : PrimeSpectrum Γ(T, W)) :
207	    Module.rankAtStalk Γ(G, W) p = pointRank T G (hW.fromSpec p) := by
208	  have hmem : (hW.fromSpec p : T) ∈ W := by
209	    have h0 : (hW.fromSpec p : T) ∈ Set.range hW.fromSpec :=
210	      Set.mem_range_self p
211	    rwa [hW.range_fromSpec] at h0
212	  rw [Module.rankAtStalk_eq,
213	    pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G (V := ⟨W, hW⟩) _ hmem]
214	  show p.asIdeal.fiberRank Γ(G, W) = chartFiberRank G _ hmem
215	  rw [chartFiberRank]
216	  exact Ideal.fiberRank_congr_ideal
217	    (congrArg PrimeSpectrum.asIdeal (primeIdealOf_fromSpec hW p hmem)).symm
218	
219	end RankDictionary
220	
221	section PointRankPullback
222	
223	variable {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (g : Y ⟶ X) (G : X.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
224	
225	/-- **The point rank of a pullback module is the point rank at the image
226	point** (no flatness or finiteness hypotheses; the geometric form of
227	`Ideal.fiberRank_baseChange`): for any morphism `g : Y ⟶ X` and
228	quasi-coherent `G` on `X`,
229	`pointRank (g^*G) y = pointRank G (g y)`. -/
230	theorem pointRank_pullback (y : Y) :
231	    haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom g G ‹_›
232	    pointRank Y ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G) y = pointRank X G (g y) := by
233	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom g G ‹_›
234	  -- affine charts around the image point and the point
235	  obtain ⟨V, hV, hgyV, -⟩ :=
236	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := g y) (U := ⊤) trivial
237	  have hyV : y ∈ g ⁻¹ᵁ V := hgyV
238	  obtain ⟨W, hW, hyW, hWle⟩ :=
239	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := y) (U := g ⁻¹ᵁ V) hyV
240	  -- both sides through the two charts
241	  rw [pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank _ (V := ⟨W, hW⟩) y hyW,
242	    pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G (V := ⟨V, hV⟩) (g y) hgyV]
243	  -- the section formula for the pullback module over the affine pair
244	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) := (g.appLE V W hWle).hom.toAlgebra
245	  letI : Module Γ(X, V) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) :=
246	    Module.compHom _ (g.appLE V W hWle).hom
247	  obtain ⟨⟨eqv, -⟩⟩ :=
248	    pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv g G hW hV hWle
249	  -- fiber rank through the equivalence, then base change
250	  have h1 : ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank
251	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) =
252	      ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank
253	        (TensorProduct Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) Γ(G, V)) :=
254	    Ideal.fiberRank_congr _ eqv.symm
255	  have h2 := Ideal.fiberRank_baseChange (R := Γ(X, V)) (A := Γ(Y, W))
256	    Γ(G, V) ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal)
257	  -- identify the contracted prime with the prime of the image point
258	  have h3 : ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).comap
259	      (algebraMap Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W)) =
260	      (hV.primeIdealOf ⟨g y, hgyV⟩).asIdeal := by
261	    have h4 := IsAffineOpen.comap_primeIdealOf_appLE (f := g)
262	      V hV W hW hWle hyW
263	    have h5 : algebraMap Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) = (g.appLE V W hWle).hom := rfl
264	    rw [h5]
265	    exact congrArg PrimeSpectrum.asIdeal h4
266	  show ((hW.primeIdealOf ⟨y, hyW⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank
267	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) =
268	    ((hV.primeIdealOf ⟨g y, hgyV⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank Γ(G, V)
269	  rw [h1, h2]
270	  exact Ideal.fiberRank_congr_ideal h3
271	
272	end PointRankPullback

274	/-! ## §3 Stage D1: unique factorization through the stratum -/
275	
276	section StageD1
277	
278	variable {X T : Scheme.{u}} (G : X.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent] {e : ℕ}
279	
280	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
281	/-- **The kernel bound** (the hard half of Nitsure's universal property,
282	`n = 0`, [Nitsure §4]: "`f^*𝓕` is locally free of rank `e` iff `f^*ψ = 0`
283	iff `f` factors through `V_e`"): if the pullback of `G` along `q : T ⟶ X`
284	is flat over `T` of constant point rank `e`, then the strata ideal sheaf is
285	contained in the kernel of `q` — every local relation matrix pulls back to
286	the zero matrix, so its entries die in `Γ(T, ·)`. -/
287	theorem strataData_le_ker (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (q : T ⟶ X)
288	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
289	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G))
290	    (hrank : ∀ t : T,
291	      haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q G ‹_›
292	      pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G) t = e) :
293	    strataData G e hcov ≤ q.ker := by
294	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q G ‹_›
295	  refine Scheme.IdealSheafData.le_ofIdeals_iff.mpr fun U => ?_
296	  intro r hr
297	  rw [RingHom.mem_ker]
298	  -- a finite family of `e`-presentation charts covering `U`
299	  obtain ⟨N, Vc, mmc, Pc, hVcU, hcovU⟩ :=
300	    ChartsCover.exists_finite_charts G hcov U
301	  -- the pulled-back section dies on an affine neighbourhood of each point
302	  apply T.IsSheaf.section_ext fun t ht => ?_
303	  obtain ⟨i, hti⟩ := hcovU (q.base t) ht
304	  have htVc : t ∈ q ⁻¹ᵁ (Vc i).1 := hti
305	  obtain ⟨W, hW, htW, hWle⟩ :=
306	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := t) (U := q ⁻¹ᵁ (Vc i).1) htVc
307	  have hV : W ≤ q ⁻¹ᵁ U.1 := fun y hy => hVcU i (hWle hy)
308	  refine ⟨W, hV, htW, ?_⟩
309	  -- the relation matrix of the chart pulls back to zero on `W`
310	  haveI hFlatW : Module.Flat Γ(T, W)
311	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G, W) :=
312	    flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id hflat hW
313	  obtain ⟨P', hP'⟩ := exists_matrixPresentation_pullback_sections q G
314	    (Vc i).2 hW hWle (Pc i)
315	  haveI : Module.Finite Γ(T, W) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G, W) :=
316	    Module.Finite.of_surjective P'.proj P'.surjective_proj
317	  have h0 : P'.relMatrix = 0 :=
318	    P'.relMatrix_eq_zero_of_flat fun p =>
319	      (rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank _ hW p).trans (hrank _)
320	  -- hence the entry ideal is killed by `q.appLE (Vc i) W`
321	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, (Vc i).1) Γ(T, W) := (q.appLE (Vc i).1 W hWle).hom.toAlgebra
322	  have hker : (Pc i).entryIdeal ≤
323	      RingHom.ker (algebraMap Γ(X, (Vc i).1) Γ(T, W)) :=
324	    (_root_.Module.MatrixPresentation.relMatrix_map_eq_zero_iff
325	      (A := Γ(T, W))).mp (hP' ▸ h0)
326	  -- the strata-ideal condition at the chart
327	  have hmem : X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op r ∈ (Pc i).entryIdeal :=
328	    (mem_strataIdeal_iff G).mp hr (Vc i) (hVcU i) (mmc i) (Pc i)
329	  have hzero : (q.appLE (Vc i).1 W hWle).hom
330	      (X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op r) = 0 :=
331	    RingHom.mem_ker.mp (hker hmem)
332	  -- assemble: restriction of `q.app U r` to `W` is `q.appLE (Vc i) W` of
333	  -- the restricted section
334	  have hres : (T.presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op).hom ((q.app U.1).hom r) =
335	      (q.appLE U.1 W hV).hom r := rfl
336	  show (T.presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op).hom ((q.app U.1).hom r) =
337	    (T.presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op).hom 0
338	  rw [map_zero, hres, ← appLE_base_res_apply' q (hVcU i) hWle hV r, hzero]
339	
340	/-- **Unique factorization through the rank-`e` stratum** [Nitsure §4,
341	part (ii), `n = 0` case]: a morphism `q : T ⟶ X` whose pulled-back module
342	is flat over `T` of constant point rank `e` factors uniquely through the
343	closed immersion of the rank-`e` stratum. -/
344	theorem existsUnique_stratumLift (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (q : T ⟶ X)
345	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
346	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G))
347	    (hrank : ∀ t : T,
348	      haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q G ‹_›
349	      pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj G) t = e) :
350	    ∃! l : T ⟶ stratum G e hcov, l ≫ stratumι G e hcov = q := by
351	  have hker : (stratumι G e hcov).ker ≤ q.ker := by
352	    have h1 : (stratumι G e hcov).ker = strataData G e hcov :=
353	      Scheme.IdealSheafData.ker_subschemeι (strataData G e hcov)
354	    rw [h1]
355	    exact strataData_le_ker G hcov q hflat hrank
356	  refine ⟨IsClosedImmersion.lift (stratumι G e hcov) q hker,
357	    IsClosedImmersion.lift_fac _ _ hker, fun l' hl' => ?_⟩
358	  rw [← cancel_mono (stratumι G e hcov), hl',
359	    IsClosedImmersion.lift_fac]
360	
361	end StageD1
362	
363	/-! ## §4 Stage D2: the stratum pullback is flat -/
364	
365	section StageD2
366	
367	variable {X : Scheme.{u}} (G : X.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent] {e : ℕ}
368	
369	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
370	/-- **The rank-`e` stratum flattens `G`** [Nitsure §4, `n = 0`: on `V_e`
371	the pulled-back presentation has vanishing relation matrix, so `𝓕|_{V_e}`
372	is free of rank `e`]: the pullback of `G` along the stratum immersion is
373	flat over the stratum. -/
374	theorem coherentSheafFlat_stratum (hcov : ChartsCover G e) :
375	    Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (stratum G e hcov))
376	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (stratumι G e hcov)).obj G) := by
377	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (stratumι G e hcov) G ‹_›
378	  -- the chart preimages cover the stratum
379	  have hcover : ∀ z : stratum G e hcov,
380	      ∃ j : {V : X.affineOpens // IsPresentationChart G e V},
381	        z ∈ stratumι G e hcov ⁻¹ᵁ j.1.1 := by
382	    intro z
383	    obtain ⟨V, hzV, hchart⟩ := hcov ((stratumι G e hcov).base z)
384	    exact ⟨⟨V, hchart⟩, hzV⟩
385	  -- flat sections on each chart preimage: the pulled-back presentation
386	  -- has vanishing relation matrix, so the section module is free
387	  have hflatj : ∀ j : {V : X.affineOpens // IsPresentationChart G e V},
388	      Module.Flat Γ(stratum G e hcov, stratumι G e hcov ⁻¹ᵁ j.1.1)
389	        Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (stratumι G e hcov)).obj G,

428	/-! ## §5 Stage E: chart supply and the chart locus (noetherian base) -/
429	
430	section ChartSupply
431	
432	/-- Any finitely presented module admits a matrix presentation (the
433	generators of the finitely generated kernel of a finite free surjection
434	are the columns of the relation matrix). -/
435	theorem _root_.Module.FinitePresentation.exists_matrixPresentation
436	    {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u} [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
437	    [Module.FinitePresentation R M] :
438	    ∃ (ee mm : ℕ), Nonempty (MatrixPresentation R M ee mm) := by
439	  classical
440	  obtain ⟨n, K, eqv, hK⟩ :=
441	    Module.FinitePresentation.exists_fin R M
442	  obtain ⟨T, hT⟩ := hK
443	  refine ⟨n, T.card, ⟨MatrixPresentation.congr (N := M) {
444	    relMatrix := Matrix.of fun i j ↦ (T.equivFin.symm j : Fin n → R) i
445	    proj := K.mkQ
446	    surjective_proj := Submodule.mkQ_surjective K
447	    exact_mulVecLin_proj := ?_ } eqv.symm⟩⟩
448	  rw [LinearMap.exact_iff, Submodule.ker_mkQ, ← hT]
449	  apply le_antisymm
450	  · -- each generator is a column of the matrix
451	    rw [Submodule.span_le]
452	    intro t ht
453	    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := T.equivFin.symm.surjective ⟨t, ht⟩
454	    refine ⟨Pi.single j 1, ?_⟩
455	    funext i
456	    simp only [Matrix.mulVecLin_apply, Matrix.mulVec, Matrix.of_apply]
457	    rw [dotProduct_single, mul_one, hj]
458	  · -- every matrix-vector product is a combination of the columns
459	    rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
460	    have hcol : (Matrix.of fun i j ↦ (T.equivFin.symm j : Fin n → R) i).mulVecLin x =
461	        ∑ j, x j • ((T.equivFin.symm j : Fin n → R)) := by
462	      funext i
463	      simp [Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct, Finset.sum_apply, mul_comm]
464	    rw [hcol]
465	    exact Submodule.sum_mem _ fun j _ ↦ Submodule.smul_mem _ _
466	      (Submodule.subset_span (T.equivFin.symm j).2)
467	
468	variable {S : Scheme.{u}}
469	
470	-- the `Γ(S, U)`-module structure on sections over a basic open, from
471	-- `AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.EntryIdealStratum` (declared there as local
472	-- instances)
473	attribute [local instance] moduleSectionBasicOpen isScalarTowerSectionBasicOpen
474	
475	/-- **Chart supply at every point** ([Nitsure §4], Nakayama prolongation of
476	a fibre basis; the geometric form of
477	`Module.FinitePresentation.exists_matrixPresentation_of_isLocalizedModule`):
478	on a locally noetherian scheme, every point of a finitely presented module
479	sheaf has an `e`-presentation chart around it with `e` its own point
480	rank. -/
481	theorem exists_presentationChart_mem [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
482	    (F : S.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] (s : S) :
483	    ∃ V : S.affineOpens, s ∈ V.1 ∧
484	      IsPresentationChart F (pointRank S F s) V := by
485	  obtain ⟨V, hV, hsV, -, hfin⟩ := exists_affine_finite_sections_nhds F s ⊤ trivial
486	  haveI : IsNoetherianRing Γ(S, V) :=
487	    IsLocallyNoetherian.component_noetherian ⟨V, hV⟩
488	  haveI : Module.Finite Γ(S, V) Γ(F, V) := hfin
489	  haveI : Module.FinitePresentation Γ(S, V) Γ(F, V) :=
490	    Module.finitePresentation_of_finite _ _
491	  obtain ⟨g, hgp, hloc⟩ :=
492	    Module.FinitePresentation.exists_matrixPresentation_of_isLocalizedModule
493	      (M := Γ(F, V)) (hV.primeIdealOf ⟨s, hsV⟩).asIdeal
494	  haveI := hV.isLocalization_basicOpen g
495	  haveI := Scheme.Modules.isLocalizedModule_basicOpen F hV g
496	  obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hloc Γ(S, S.basicOpen g) Γ(F, S.basicOpen g)
497	    (restrictBasicOpenₗ F g)
498	  have hrank : ((hV.primeIdealOf ⟨s, hsV⟩).asIdeal).fiberRank Γ(F, V) =
499	      pointRank S F s :=
500	    (pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank F (V := ⟨V, hV⟩) s hsV).symm
501	  refine ⟨S.affineBasicOpen (U := ⟨V, hV⟩) g, ?_, mm, ⟨hrank ▸ P⟩⟩
502	  exact (hV.mem_basicOpen_iff_notMem_primeIdealOf g ⟨s, hsV⟩).mpr hgp
503	
504	variable (F : S.Modules) (e : ℕ)
505	
506	/-- The **chart locus**: the union of all `e`-presentation charts — the
507	open locus on which the rank-`e` stratum is a closed subscheme
508	[Nitsure §4: the ambient open `V` of the local construction]. -/
509	noncomputable def chartLocus : S.Opens :=
510	  ⨆ V : {V : S.affineOpens // IsPresentationChart F e V}, V.1.1
511	
512	/-- Points of point rank exactly `e` lie in the chart locus. -/
513	theorem mem_chartLocus_of_pointRank_eq [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
514	    [F.IsFinitePresentation] {s : S} (h : pointRank S F s = e) :
515	    s ∈ chartLocus F e := by
516	  obtain ⟨V, hsV, hchart⟩ := exists_presentationChart_mem F s
517	  exact TopologicalSpace.Opens.mem_iSup.mpr ⟨⟨V, h ▸ hchart⟩, hsV⟩
518	
519	/-- Points of the chart locus have point rank at most `e` (an
520	`e`-generator presentation bounds every fibre dimension). -/
521	theorem pointRank_le_of_mem_chartLocus [F.IsQuasicoherent] {s : S}
522	    (h : s ∈ chartLocus F e) : pointRank S F s ≤ e := by
523	  obtain ⟨⟨V, hchart⟩, hsV⟩ := TopologicalSpace.Opens.mem_iSup.mp h
524	  obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart
525	  rw [pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank F (V := V) s hsV]
526	  exact P.fiberRank_le _
527	
528	end ChartSupply

532	section FlatPullback
533	
534	/-- **Flatness is stable under arbitrary pullback**: if `G` is flat over
535	`T` (via `𝟙 T`), then `g^*G` is flat over `T'` for any morphism
536	`g : T' ⟶ T` — affine-locally the sections are a base change of a flat
537	module. -/
538	theorem coherentSheafFlat_id_pullback {T' T : Scheme.{u}} (g : T' ⟶ T)
539	    (G : T.Modules) [G.IsQuasicoherent]
540	    (h : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T) G) :
541	    Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T') ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G) := by
542	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom g G ‹_›
543	  -- cover `T'` by affine opens lying over affine opens of `T`
544	  set J := {p : T'.Opens × T.Opens //
545	    IsAffineOpen p.1 ∧ IsAffineOpen p.2 ∧ p.1 ≤ g ⁻¹ᵁ p.2} with hJ
546	  have hcover : ∀ t' : T', ∃ j : J, t' ∈ j.1.1 := by
547	    intro t'
548	    obtain ⟨V, hV, hgt', -⟩ :=
549	      exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := g.base t') (U := ⊤) trivial
550	    have ht' : t' ∈ g ⁻¹ᵁ V := hgt'
551	    obtain ⟨W, hW, htW, hWle⟩ :=
552	      exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := t') (U := g ⁻¹ᵁ V) ht'
553	    exact ⟨⟨(W, V), hW, hV, hWle⟩, htW⟩
554	  have hflatj : ∀ j : J, Module.Flat Γ(T', j.1.1)
555	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, j.1.1) := by
556	    intro ⟨⟨W, V⟩, hW, hV, hle⟩
557	    haveI : Module.Flat Γ(T, V) Γ(G, V) :=
558	      flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id h hV

558	      flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id h hV
559	    letI : Algebra Γ(T, V) Γ(T', W) := (g.appLE V W hle).hom.toAlgebra
560	    letI : Module Γ(T, V) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) :=
561	      Module.compHom _ (g.appLE V W hle).hom
562	    obtain ⟨⟨eqv, -⟩⟩ :=
563	      pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv g G hW hV hle
564	    exact Module.Flat.of_linearEquiv eqv.symm
565	  intro U hU V hV eV
566	  exact flat_section_of_affine_cover (𝟙 T') ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G)
567	    (fun j : J => j.1.1) (fun j => j.2.1) (fun j : J => j.1.1) (fun j => j.2.1)
568	    (fun j => le_refl _) hcover
569	    (fun j => (flat_compHom_congr
570	      ((𝟙 T' : T' ⟶ T').appLE j.1.1 j.1.1 (le_refl _)).hom
571	      (id_appLE_apply _)).mpr (hflatj j)) hU hV eV
572	
573	end FlatPullback
574	
575	section RankStratum
576	
577	variable {S : Scheme.{u}} (F : S.Modules) (e : ℕ) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
578	
579	/-- The restriction of `F` to the chart locus is chart-covered: the charts
580	of `S` inside the chart locus pull back to charts of the open subscheme
581	(the pullback of an `e`-generator presentation is an `e`-generator
582	presentation). -/
583	theorem chartsCover_chartLocus :
584	    ChartsCover ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e := by
585	  intro x
586	  have hx : ((chartLocus F e).ι.base x) ∈ chartLocus F e := by
587	    have h0 : ((chartLocus F e).ι.base x) ∈ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι :=
588	      Set.mem_range_self x
589	    rwa [Scheme.Opens.range_ι] at h0
590	  obtain ⟨⟨V, hchart⟩, hxV⟩ := TopologicalSpace.Opens.mem_iSup.mp hx
591	  have hVle : V.1 ≤ (chartLocus F e).ι.opensRange := by
592	    rw [Scheme.Opens.opensRange_ι]
593	    exact le_iSup
594	      (fun W : {V : S.affineOpens // IsPresentationChart F e V} => W.1.1)
595	      ⟨V, hchart⟩
596	  have hpre : IsAffineOpen ((chartLocus F e).ι ⁻¹ᵁ V.1) :=
597	    V.2.preimage_of_isOpenImmersion (chartLocus F e).ι hVle
598	  refine ⟨⟨(chartLocus F e).ι ⁻¹ᵁ V.1, hpre⟩, hxV, ?_⟩
599	  obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart
600	  obtain ⟨P', -⟩ := exists_matrixPresentation_pullback_sections
601	    (chartLocus F e).ι F V.2 hpre le_rfl P
602	  exact ⟨mm, ⟨P'⟩⟩
603	
604	/-- The **rank-`e` stratum of `F`**: the canonical closed subscheme of the
605	chart locus cut out by the entry ideals [Nitsure §4, `n = 0`: the closed
606	subscheme `V_e ⊆ V`]. -/
607	noncomputable def rankStratum : Scheme.{u} :=
608	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
609	  stratum ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
610	    (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)
611	
612	/-- The locally closed immersion of the rank-`e` stratum into the base. -/
613	noncomputable def rankStratumι : rankStratum F e ⟶ S :=
614	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
615	  stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
616	    (chartsCover_chartLocus F e) ≫ (chartLocus F e).ι
617	
618	instance : IsImmersion (rankStratumι F e) := by
619	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
620	  show IsImmersion
621	    (stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
622	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e) ≫ (chartLocus F e).ι)
623	  infer_instance
624	
625	/-- **The support of the rank-`e` stratum is the rank-`e` locus**
626	[Nitsure §4, part (i)]. -/
627	theorem mem_range_rankStratumι_iff [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
628	    [F.IsFinitePresentation] (s : S) :
629	    s ∈ Set.range (rankStratumι F e).base ↔ pointRank S F s = e := by
630	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
631	  constructor
632	  · rintro ⟨z, rfl⟩
633	    have hz : (rankStratumι F e).base z = ((chartLocus F e).ι.base)
634	        ((stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
635	          (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)).base z) := rfl
636	    rw [hz, ← pointRank_pullback (chartLocus F e).ι F]
637	    exact (mem_range_stratumι_iff _ (chartsCover_chartLocus F e) _).mp
638	      ⟨z, rfl⟩
639	  · intro h
640	    have hs : s ∈ chartLocus F e := mem_chartLocus_of_pointRank_eq F e h
641	    have hs' : s ∈ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι := by
642	      rwa [Scheme.Opens.range_ι]
643	    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hs'
644	    have hrx : pointRank ((chartLocus F e) : Scheme.{u})
645	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) x = e := by
646	      rw [pointRank_pullback (chartLocus F e).ι F x, hx]
647	      exact h
648	    obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := (mem_range_stratumι_iff _
649	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e) x).mpr hrx
650	    refine ⟨z, ?_⟩
651	    show ((chartLocus F e).ι.base)
652	      ((stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
653	        (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)).base z) = s
654	    rw [show ((stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
655	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)).base z) = x from hz, hx]
656	
657	/-- **The rank-`e` stratum flattens `F`** [Nitsure §4, part (i)]: the
658	pullback of `F` along the stratum immersion is flat over the stratum. -/
659	theorem coherentSheafFlat_rankStratum :
660	    Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (rankStratum F e))
661	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (rankStratumι F e)).obj F) := by
662	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F ‹_›
663	  intro U hU V hV eV
664	  exact coherentSheafFlat_of_iso (𝟙 (rankStratum F e))
665	    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp
666	      (stratumι ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) e
667	        (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)) (chartLocus F e).ι).app F)
668	    (coherentSheafFlat_stratum
669	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F)
670	      (chartsCover_chartLocus F e)) hU hV eV
671	
672	end RankStratum

674	/-! ## §7 Stage E: rank bound and openness of the rank fibers -/
675	
676	section RankBound
677	
678	variable {S : Scheme.{u}}
679	
680	/-- **The point rank is bounded on a noetherian scheme**: finitely many
681	presentation charts cover `S` by quasi-compactness, and each caps the rank
682	by its generator count. -/
683	theorem exists_pointRank_le [IsNoetherian S] (F : S.Modules)
684	    [F.IsFinitePresentation] : ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ s : S, pointRank S F s ≤ N := by
685	  classical
686	  choose Vc hVc hchart using exists_presentationChart_mem (S := S) F
687	  have hcov : (Set.univ : Set S) ⊆ ⋃ s : S, ((Vc s).1 : Set S) := fun x _ =>
688	    Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨x, hVc x⟩
689	  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := isCompact_univ.elim_finite_subcover
690	    (fun s : S => ((Vc s).1 : Set S)) (fun s => (Vc s).1.isOpen) hcov
691	  refine ⟨t.sup fun s => pointRank S F s, fun x => ?_⟩
692	  obtain ⟨s, hst, hxs⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp (ht (Set.mem_univ x))
693	  calc pointRank S F x ≤ pointRank S F s := by
694	        obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart s
695	        rw [pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank F (V := Vc s) x hxs]
696	        exact P.fiberRank_le _
697	    _ ≤ t.sup (fun s => pointRank S F s) := Finset.le_sup hst
698	
699	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
700	/-- **The rank fibers of a flat pullback are open** (local constancy of the
701	rank of a flat, finitely presented module, geometrized through `fromSpec`):
702	if `φ^*F` is flat over `T`, the locus where its point rank equals `e` is
703	open in `T`. -/
704	theorem isOpen_pointRank_pullback_eq {T : Scheme.{u}} [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
705	    (F : S.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] (φ : T ⟶ S)
706	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
707	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F)) (e : ℕ) :
708	    haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom φ F inferInstance
709	    IsOpen {t : T | pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) t = e} := by
710	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom φ F inferInstance
711	  rw [isOpen_iff_forall_mem_open]
712	  intro t₀ ht₀
713	  -- affine charts: `V ∋ φ t₀` with finitely presented sections, `W ∋ t₀`
714	  obtain ⟨V, hV, hφt, -, hfin⟩ :=
715	    exists_affine_finite_sections_nhds F (φ.base t₀) ⊤ trivial
716	  haveI : IsNoetherianRing Γ(S, V) :=
717	    IsLocallyNoetherian.component_noetherian ⟨V, hV⟩
718	  haveI : Module.Finite Γ(S, V) Γ(F, V) := hfin
719	  haveI : Module.FinitePresentation Γ(S, V) Γ(F, V) :=
720	    Module.finitePresentation_of_finite _ _
721	  have ht' : t₀ ∈ φ ⁻¹ᵁ V := hφt
722	  obtain ⟨W, hW, htW, hWle⟩ :=
723	    exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (x := t₀) (U := φ ⁻¹ᵁ V) ht'
724	  -- section module over `W`: flat and finitely presented
725	  haveI : Module.Flat Γ(T, W) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W) :=
726	    flat_sections_of_coherentSheafFlat_id hflat hW
727	  obtain ⟨ee, mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := Module.FinitePresentation.exists_matrixPresentation
728	    (R := Γ(S, V)) (M := Γ(F, V))
729	  obtain ⟨P', -⟩ := exists_matrixPresentation_pullback_sections φ F hV hW hWle P
730	  haveI : Module.FinitePresentation Γ(T, W)
731	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W) := P'.finitePresentation
732	  -- transport the locally constant stalk rank through `fromSpec`
733	  have hlc := Module.isLocallyConstant_rankAtStalk
734	    (R := Γ(T, W)) (M := Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W))
735	  refine ⟨hW.fromSpec.base ''
736	    (Module.rankAtStalk Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W) ⁻¹' {e}),
737	    ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
738	  · rintro _ ⟨p, hp, rfl⟩
739	    show pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F)
740	      (hW.fromSpec.base p) = e
741	    rw [← rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank
742	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) hW p]
743	    exact hp
744	  · exact hW.fromSpec.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap _ (hlc.isOpen_fiber e)
745	  · refine ⟨hW.primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
746	    · show Module.rankAtStalk Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F, W)
747	        (hW.primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩) = e
748	      rw [rankAtStalk_sections_eq_pointRank
749	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) hW]
750	      have hfs : (hW.fromSpec.base (hW.primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩) : T) = t₀ :=
751	        hW.fromSpec_primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩
752	      rw [hfs]
753	      exact ht₀
754	    · exact hW.fromSpec_primeIdealOf ⟨t₀, htW⟩
755	
756	end RankBound

758	/-! ## §8 Stage E: the universal factorization through a single stratum -/
759	
760	section FactorRankStratum
761	
762	variable {S : Scheme.{u}} (F : S.Modules) [F.IsQuasicoherent]
763	
764	set_option maxHeartbeats 800000 in
765	/-- **Unique factorization through the rank-`e` stratum of the base**
766	[Nitsure §4, part (ii), `n = 0`, single-rank case]: a morphism `φ : T ⟶ S`
767	whose pulled-back module is flat with *constant* point rank `e` (measured
768	on the base) factors uniquely through the locally closed immersion
769	`rankStratumι`. -/
770	theorem existsUnique_factor_rankStratum [IsLocallyNoetherian S]
771	    [F.IsFinitePresentation] (e : ℕ) {T : Scheme.{u}} (φ : T ⟶ S)
772	    (hflat : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
773	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F))
774	    (hrank : ∀ t : T, pointRank S F (φ.base t) = e) :
775	    ∃! l : T ⟶ rankStratum F e, l ≫ rankStratumι F e = φ := by
776	  haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom (chartLocus F e).ι F inferInstance
777	  -- `φ` lands in the chart locus
778	  have hrange : Set.range φ.base ⊆ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι.base := by
779	    rintro _ ⟨t, rfl⟩
780	    have h1 : φ.base t ∈ chartLocus F e :=
781	      mem_chartLocus_of_pointRank_eq F e (hrank t)
782	    have h2 : (chartLocus F e : Set S) ⊆ Set.range (chartLocus F e).ι.base := by
783	      rw [Scheme.Opens.range_ι]
784	    exact h2 h1
785	  set q : T ⟶ (chartLocus F e : Scheme.{u}) :=
786	    IsOpenImmersion.lift (chartLocus F e).ι φ hrange with hq
787	  have hqfac : q ≫ (chartLocus F e).ι = φ :=
788	    IsOpenImmersion.lift_fac (chartLocus F e).ι φ hrange
789	  -- flatness of the pullback along `q`
790	  have hflat_q : Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T)
791	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj
792	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F)) := by
793	    intro U hU V hV eV
794	    exact coherentSheafFlat_of_iso (𝟙 T)
795	      (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp q (chartLocus F e).ι).app F ≪≫
796	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr hqfac).app F).symm) hflat hU hV eV
797	  -- constant rank of the pullback along `q`
798	  have hrank_q : ∀ t : T,
799	      haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom q
800	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) ‹_›
801	      pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback q).obj
802	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F)) t = e := by
803	    intro t
804	    rw [pointRank_pullback q ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartLocus F e).ι).obj F) t,
805	      pointRank_pullback (chartLocus F e).ι F]
806	    have hpt : (chartLocus F e).ι.base (q.base t) = φ.base t := by
807	      have := congrArg (fun m : T ⟶ S => m.base t) hqfac

104	/-- **Matrix presentations pull back to section modules** (the geometric
105	base-change of a local presentation, [Nitsure §4]: "the pulled-back
106	sequence is exact by right-exactness of tensor products").  For a morphism
107	`g : Y ⟶ X`, an affine `V ⊆ X`, an affine `W ⊆ g⁻¹V` and an `ee`-generator
108	presentation `P` of `Γ(G, V)`, the section module `Γ(g^*G, W)` admits an
109	`ee`-generator presentation whose relation matrix is the image of that of
110	`P` under `g.appLE`. -/
111	theorem exists_matrixPresentation_pullback_sections
112	    {V : X.Opens} (hV : IsAffineOpen V) {W : Y.Opens} (hW : IsAffineOpen W)
113	    (e : W ≤ g ⁻¹ᵁ V) {ee mm : ℕ}
114	    (P : MatrixPresentation Γ(X, V) Γ(G, V) ee mm) :
115	    ∃ P' : MatrixPresentation Γ(Y, W)
116	      Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) ee mm,
117	      P'.relMatrix = P.relMatrix.map (g.appLE V W e).hom := by
118	  letI : Algebra Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) := (g.appLE V W e).hom.toAlgebra
119	  letI : Module Γ(X, V) Γ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).obj G, W) :=
120	    Module.compHom _ (g.appLE V W e).hom
121	  obtain ⟨⟨eqv, -⟩⟩ :=
122	    pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv g G hW hV e
123	  refine ⟨(P.baseChange Γ(Y, W)).congr eqv, ?_⟩
124	  rw [Module.MatrixPresentation.congr_relMatrix,
125	    Module.MatrixPresentation.baseChange_relMatrix,
126	    RingHom.algebraMap_toAlgebra]
127	
128	end PullbackPresentation

132	/-- Transport of `Module.Flat` between the canonical module structure and a
133	`Module.compHom` structure along a pointwise-identity ring endomorphism
134	(the `appLE` of the identity morphism is the identity restriction, but not
135	definitionally the identity ring hom). -/
136	private lemma flat_compHom_congr {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u}
137	    [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M] (f : R →+* R) (hf : ∀ r, f r = r) :
138	    (letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M f
139	     Module.Flat R M) ↔ Module.Flat R M := by
140	  have h : (Module.compHom M f : Module R M) = ‹Module R M› :=
141	    Module.ext' _ _ fun r m => by
142	      show f r • m = r • m
143	      rw [hf r]
144	  exact (congrArg (fun i : Module R M => @Module.Flat R M _ _ i) h).to_iff

863	Proof (run 0010, T12): the strata are the canonical rank-`e` strata
864	`rankStratum F e` — closed subschemes of the open chart loci cut out by the
865	entry ideals (`AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.EntryIdealStratum`) — for
866	`e ≤ N` a rank bound (`exists_pointRank_le`, noetherian compactness).
867	Support, disjointness and covering are `mem_range_rankStratumι_iff`;
868	flatness over the strata is `coherentSheafFlat_rankStratum` (the pulled
869	back presentation has vanishing relation matrix).  For the universal
870	property, `T` decomposes into *open* rank pieces (local constancy of the
871	rank of a flat finitely presented module, `isOpen_pointRank_pullback_eq`),
872	giving a colimit cofan; each piece factors uniquely through its stratum
873	(`existsUnique_factor_rankStratum`, via `IsClosedImmersion.lift` and the
874	vanishing of the pulled-back relation matrices, `strataData_le_ker`), and
875	the factorizations assemble.  Uniqueness: any competing factorization
876	lands, piecewise, in the same summand (the summand ranges have distinct
877	ranks), where it agrees by the monomorphism property of immersions. -/
878	theorem flatLocusStratification_universal {S : Scheme.{u}} [IsNoetherian S]
879	    (F : S.Modules) [F.IsFinitePresentation] :
880	    ∃ (I : Type u) (_ : Finite I) (S_ : I → Scheme.{u}) (ι : ∀ f, S_ f ⟶ S),
881	      (∀ f, IsImmersion (ι f)) ∧
882	      (∀ s : S, ∃ f, s ∈ Set.range (ι f).base) ∧
883	      (∀ f g, f ≠ g → Disjoint (Set.range (ι f).base) (Set.range (ι g).base)) ∧
884	      (∀ f, Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 (S_ f))
885	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (ι f)).obj F)) ∧
886	      (∀ {T : Scheme.{u}} (φ : T ⟶ S),
887	        Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 T) ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) →
888	        ∃! ψ : T ⟶ ∐ S_, ψ ≫ Sigma.desc ι = φ) := by
889	  classical
890	  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := exists_pointRank_le F
891	  refine ⟨ULift.{u} (Fin (N + 1)), inferInstance,
892	    fun i => rankStratum F i.down.1, fun i => rankStratumι F i.down.1,
893	    fun i => inferInstance, ?_, ?_,
894	    fun i => coherentSheafFlat_rankStratum F i.down.1, ?_⟩
895	  · -- covering: every point lies in the stratum of its own rank
896	    intro s
897	    exact ⟨⟨⟨pointRank S F s, Nat.lt_succ_of_le (hN s)⟩⟩,
898	      (mem_range_rankStratumι_iff F _ s).mpr rfl⟩
899	  · -- disjointness: the strata have distinct ranks
900	    intro i j hij
901	    rw [Set.disjoint_left]
902	    intro s hsi hsj
903	    have hi := (mem_range_rankStratumι_iff F i.down.1 s).mp hsi
904	    have hj := (mem_range_rankStratumι_iff F j.down.1 s).mp hsj
905	    exact hij (ULift.down_injective (Fin.val_injective (hi.symm.trans hj)))
906	  · -- the universal property
907	    intro T φ hφ
908	    haveI := pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom φ F inferInstance
909	    have hρle : ∀ t : T,
910	        pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) t ≤ N := by
911	      intro t
912	      rw [pointRank_pullback φ F t]
913	      exact hN _
914	    -- the open rank pieces of `T`
915	    set Tp : ULift.{u} (Fin (N + 1)) → T.Opens := fun i =>
916	      ⟨{t : T | pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) t = i.down.1},
917	        isOpen_pointRank_pullback_eq F φ hφ i.down.1⟩ with hTp
918	    have hcovT : ⨆ i, (Tp i).ι.opensRange = ⊤ := by
919	      rw [eq_top_iff]
920	      intro t _
921	      rw [TopologicalSpace.Opens.mem_iSup]
922	      refine ⟨⟨⟨pointRank T ((Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj F) t,
923	        Nat.lt_succ_of_le (hρle t)⟩⟩, ?_⟩
924	      rw [Scheme.Opens.opensRange_ι]
925	      exact rfl
926	    have hdisjT : Pairwise (Function.onFun Disjoint
927	        fun i => (Tp i).ι.opensRange) := by
928	      intro i j hij
929	      simp only [Function.onFun, Scheme.Opens.opensRange_ι]
930	      intro W hWi hWj t ht
931	      exact absurd (ULift.down_injective (Fin.val_injective
932	        ((hWi ht).symm.trans (hWj ht)))) hij
933	    obtain ⟨hcolim⟩ := nonempty_isColimit_cofanMk_of
934	      (fun i => (Tp i).ι) hcovT hdisjT
935	    -- unique factorization of each piece through its stratum
936	    have hfac_data : ∀ i : ULift.{u} (Fin (N + 1)),
937	        ∃! l : ((Tp i) : Scheme.{u}) ⟶ rankStratum F i.down.1,
938	          l ≫ rankStratumι F i.down.1 = (Tp i).ι ≫ φ := by
939	      intro i

2550	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — gap2 single-chart transport
2551	
2552	The general-scheme keystone `lem:qcoh_section_localization_basicOpen`
2553	(`isLocalizedModule_basicOpen`): for a quasi-coherent sheaf of modules `M` on an *arbitrary* scheme
2554	`X`, an affine open `U`, and `f : Γ(X, U)`, the section restriction `Γ(M, U) → Γ(M, D(f))` is
2555	`IsLocalizedModule (powers f)` over `Γ(X, U)`.
2556	
2557	It is the single-chart affine transport on top of G1-core: pull `M` back along the affine immersion
2558	`hU.fromSpec : Spec Γ(X, U) ⟶ X` (range `U`), so the pullback `M'` is quasi-coherent on
2559	`Spec Γ(X, U)`, where gap1 gives `IsIso M'.fromTildeΓ`; the engine
2560	`isLocalizedModule_restrict_of_isIso_fromTildeΓ` localizes the slice restriction over `Γ(X, U)`, and
2561	the `σ`-semilinear section comparison `gammaPullbackImageIso` (bridge (I)
2562	`isLocalizedModule_of_ringEquiv_semilinear`) transports it to the `M`-side restriction. No
2563	cover-and-glue: `U` is already affine, so there is a single chart. -/
2564	
2565	/-- **The `Γ(X,U)`-linear section restriction map of a sheaf of modules.** For `M : X.Modules` and
2566	an inclusion of opens `i : V ⟶ U`, the presheaf restriction `Γ(M, U) → Γ(M, V)` is `Γ(X, U)`-linear
2567	when `Γ(M, V)` carries the `Γ(X, U)`-module structure restricted along `X.presheaf.map i.op`
2568	(`Module.compHom`). Linearity is `Scheme.Modules.map_smul`. Project-local: the linear-map packaging
2569	of the section restriction needed to state `IsLocalizedModule` for a general scheme (Mathlib's
2570	presheaf-of-modules restriction is semilinear, not bundled this way). -/
2571	noncomputable def restrictₗ {X : Scheme.{u}} (M : X.Modules) {U V : X.Opens} (i : V ⟶ U) :
2572	    letI : Module Γ(X, U) Γ(M, V) := Module.compHom _ (X.presheaf.map i.op).hom
2573	    Γ(M, U) →ₗ[Γ(X, U)] Γ(M, V) :=
2574	  letI : Module Γ(X, U) Γ(M, V) := Module.compHom _ (X.presheaf.map i.op).hom
2575	  { toFun := fun x => M.presheaf.map i.op x
2576	    map_add' := map_add _
2577	    map_smul' := fun r x => Scheme.Modules.map_smul M i r x }
2578	
2579	/-- **The `Γ(X,U)`-linear restriction of sections to a basic open `D(f)`** (`f : Γ(X, U)`). The
2580	section restriction `Γ(M, U) → Γ(M, X.basicOpen f)` is `Γ(X, U)`-linear, where `Γ(M, X.basicOpen f)`
2581	carries any `Γ(X, U)`-module structure compatible (via `IsScalarTower`) with its native
2582	`Γ(X, X.basicOpen f)`-module structure and the canonical `Γ(X, U)`-algebra map
2583	`Γ(X, U) → Γ(X, X.basicOpen f)` (the restriction `X.presheaf.map`). Linearity combines
2584	`Scheme.Modules.map_smul` with the scalar tower. This is the consumer-facing shape of the gap2
2585	keystone (instances supplied by the caller, matching `Module.annihilator_isLocalizedModule_eq_map`).
2586	Project-local. -/
2587	noncomputable def restrictBasicOpenₗ {X : Scheme.{u}} (M : X.Modules) {U : X.Opens} (f : Γ(X, U))
2588	    [Module Γ(X, U) Γ(M, X.basicOpen f)]
2589	    [IsScalarTower Γ(X, U) Γ(X, X.basicOpen f) Γ(M, X.basicOpen f)] :
2590	    Γ(M, U) →ₗ[Γ(X, U)] Γ(M, X.basicOpen f) where
2591	  toFun := fun x => M.presheaf.map (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le f)).op x
2592	  map_add' := map_add _
2593	  map_smul' := fun r x => by
2594	    change M.presheaf.map (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le f)).op (r • x) = r • _
2595	    rw [Scheme.Modules.map_smul M (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le f)) r x,
2596	      ← algebraMap_smul Γ(X, X.basicOpen f) r (M.presheaf.map (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le f)).op x)]
2597	    rfl
2598	
2599	/-- **`fromSpec`-section coherence** (gap2 transport crux). For an affine open `U` of a scheme `X`,
2600	the `eqToHom`-transport `Γ(X, hU.fromSpec ''ᵁ ⊤) → Γ(X, U)` (along the equality
2601	`hU.fromSpec ''ᵁ ⊤ = U`) equals the composite ring iso
2602	`(hU.fromSpec.appIso ⊤).hom ≫ (ΓSpecIso Γ(X, U)).hom`. Equivalently, the section ring iso
2603	`σ = (ΓSpecIso)⁻¹ ≫ gammaImageRingEquiv (fromSpec) ⊤` underlying the gap2 section comparison is, up to
2604	this `eqToHom` transport, the identity. This is the coherence needed to read the gap2-core
2605	localization (over `Γ(X, hU.fromSpec ''ᵁ ⊤)`, at `powers (σ f)`) back as a localization over
2606	`Γ(X, U)` at `powers f`. Proof: `fromSpec_app_self` + `appIso_hom'` + cancellation of the
2607	`Spec Γ(X, U)`-presheaf maps (all between `⊤`, hence forced by `Subsingleton`). Project-local. -/
2608	theorem fromSpec_image_top_section_coherence {X : Scheme.{u}} {U : X.Opens} (hU : IsAffineOpen U)
2609	    (eT : hU.fromSpec ''ᵁ (⊤ : (Spec Γ(X, U)).Opens) = U) :
2610	    X.presheaf.map (eqToHom eT.symm).op
2611	      = (hU.fromSpec.appIso (⊤ : (Spec Γ(X, U)).Opens)).hom ≫ (Scheme.ΓSpecIso Γ(X, U)).hom := by
2612	  rw [← cancel_epi (X.presheaf.map (eqToHom eT).op),
2613	    ← X.presheaf.map_comp, ← op_comp, eqToHom_trans, eqToHom_refl, op_id, X.presheaf.map_id]
2614	  rw [Scheme.Hom.appIso_hom', Scheme.Hom.appLE]
2615	  have hnat := hU.fromSpec.naturality (eqToHom eT).op
2616	  simp only [Category.assoc]
2617	  rw [reassoc_of% hnat, hU.fromSpec_app_self]
2618	  simp only [eqToHom_unop, eqToHom_map, eqToHom_op]
2619	  simp only [Category.assoc]

3433	Stacks 01P0 / `lemma-invert-f-sections` beyond the affine case). For a quasi-coherent sheaf
3434	of modules `M` on a scheme `X` and a *quasi-compact, quasi-separated* open `W ⊆ X`, the
3435	section restriction `Γ(M, W) → Γ(M, D(g))` at any `g : Γ(X, W)` exhibits the target as the
3436	localization `Γ(M, W)[1/g]` over `Γ(X, W)`. `map_units` holds because `g` restricts to a

I now have a comprehensive picture. Here is the structured report.

---

# CoherentSheafFlat: producers, consumers, and the `compHom` handling recipe

## 0. The predicate and its `letI Module.compHom` idiom

`Scheme.CoherentSheafFlat` — `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/FlatteningStratification.lean:1416`:

```lean
def CoherentSheafFlat {X S : Scheme.{u}} (f : X ⟶ S) (F : X.Modules) : Prop :=
  ∀ {U : S.Opens} (_ : IsAffineOpen U) {V : X.Opens} (_ : IsAffineOpen V)
    (e : V ≤ f ⁻¹ᵁ U),
    letI : Module Γ(S, U) Γ(F, V) := Module.compHom _ (f.appLE U V e).hom
    Module.Flat Γ(S, U) Γ(F, V)
```

Every proof site opens with `intro U hU V hV eV` and immediately re-establishes the very same instance locally with `letI : Module Γ(...) Γ(...) := Module.compHom _ (f.appLE U V e).hom` so the goal's `Module.Flat` typechecks against a named instance. The entire engineering problem in this codebase is that this `compHom` instance is definitionally distinct from (a) the native `Γ(X,V)`-module, (b) the `compHom` instance for a different `appLE` witness, and (c) `Module.Flat` obtained over another ring — and every bridge below exists to reconcile those.

There are **six reusable infrastructure lemmas** that all sites route through; I quote them first, then give the per-site table.

---

## 1. Infrastructure lemmas for the `compHom` instance

### 1a. `appLE` elementwise coherence (fibre-side and base-side)
`GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:89` (`appLE_res_apply`) and `:99` (`appLE_base_res_apply`). These are the workhorses that discharge the `IsScalarTower` obligation when two `appLE`s land on nested opens:

```lean
private lemma appLE_res_apply {S X : Scheme.{u}} (p : X ⟶ S) {U : S.Opens}
    {W W' : X.Opens} (e : W ≤ p ⁻¹ᵁ U) (h : W' ≤ W) (u : Γ(S, U)) :
    (X.presheaf.map (homOfLE h).op).hom ((p.appLE U W e).hom u) =
      (p.appLE U W' (h.trans e)).hom u := by
  have h1 := congrArg (fun (φ : Γ(S, U) ⟶ Γ(X, W')) => φ.hom u)
    (Scheme.Hom.appLE_map (f := p) e (homOfLE h).op)
  simpa only [CommRingCat.hom_comp, RingHom.comp_apply] using h1
```
```lean
private lemma appLE_base_res_apply {S X : Scheme.{u}} (p : X ⟶ S) {U U' : S.Opens}
    {W : X.Opens} (h : U' ≤ U) (e' : W ≤ p ⁻¹ᵁ U') (e : W ≤ p ⁻¹ᵁ U) (u : Γ(S, U)) :
    (p.appLE U' W e').hom ((S.presheaf.map (homOfLE h).op).hom u) =
      (p.appLE U W e).hom u := by
  ... simpa ... using (Scheme.Hom.map_appLE (f := p) e' (homOfLE h).op) ...
```
(FlatteningStratificationUniversal.lean has a twin `appLE_base_res_apply'` used at `:338`.)

### 1b. `flat_sections_congr` — transfer `Module.Flat` across an equality of opens
`GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:110`. Used whenever `D(c) = D(c')` etc. force two different `compHom` instances on the same carrier:
```lean
private theorem flat_sections_congr {S X : Scheme.{u}} (p : X ⟶ S) (F : X.Modules)
    {U₀ : S.Opens} {O₁ O₂ : X.Opens} (hEq : O₁ = O₂)
    (e₁ : O₁ ≤ p ⁻¹ᵁ U₀) (e₂ : O₂ ≤ p ⁻¹ᵁ U₀)
    (h : letI : Module Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, O₁) := Module.compHom _ (p.appLE U₀ O₁ e₁).hom
         Module.Flat Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, O₁)) :
    letI : Module Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, O₂) := Module.compHom _ (p.appLE U₀ O₂ e₂).hom
    Module.Flat Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, O₂) := by
  subst hEq; exact h
```
The `subst` collapses the two `appLE` witnesses (proof-irrelevance of the `≤`).

### 1c. `flat_compHom_congr` — transfer `Module.Flat` between `compHom` and the native structure along a pointwise-identity ring map
`FlatteningStratificationUniversal.lean:136`. This is the bridge for `𝟙 T`, where `(𝟙 T).appLE W W e` is pointwise `id` but not defeq to `id`:
```lean
private lemma flat_compHom_congr {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u}
    [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M] (f : R →+* R) (hf : ∀ r, f r = r) :
    (letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M f
     Module.Flat R M) ↔ Module.Flat R M := by
  have h : (Module.compHom M f : Module R M) = ‹Module R M› :=
    Module.ext' _ _ fun r m => by show f r • m = r • m; rw [hf r]
  exact (congrArg (fun i : Module R M => @Module.Flat R M _ _ i) h).to_iff
```
Paired with `id_appLE_apply` (`FlatteningStratificationUniversal.lean:150`: `((𝟙 T).appLE W W e).hom r = r` via `Scheme.id_appLE`).

### 1d. `Module.Flat.of_isLocalizedModule_algebra` — mixed-base flatness stability (fibre-side localization)
`GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:131`. This is the key new Mathlib-style lemma that lets a fibre-side localization (`Γ(F,D(β)) → Γ(F,D(c))`) preserve flatness over the *base* ring:
```lean
theorem _root_.Module.Flat.of_isLocalizedModule_algebra {R B : Type v} [CommRing R]
    [CommRing B] [Algebra R B] (p : Submonoid B) {N N' : Type v} [AddCommGroup N]
    [Module R N] [Module B N] [IsScalarTower R B N] [AddCommGroup N'] [Module R N']
    [Module B N'] [IsScalarTower R B N'] (g : N →ₗ[B] N') [IsLocalizedModule p g]
    [Module.Flat R N] : Module.Flat R N' := by
  rw [Module.Flat.iff_lTensor_injectiveₛ]
  intro P _ _ I
  rw [← TensorProduct.AlgebraTensorModule.coe_lTensor (A := B)]
  rw [← IsLocalizedModule.map_lTensor (S := p) (g := g) (f := I.subtype)]
  exact IsLocalizedModule.map_injective p ... (Module.Flat.lTensor_preserves_injective_linearMap ...)
```

### 1e. `isLocalizedModule_powers_restrictScalars_of_algebraMap` — base-ring descent of a localization
`AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/QcohTildeSections.lean:664`. Converts `IsLocalizedModule (powers (algebraMap R A f)) φ` (over `A`) into `IsLocalizedModule (powers f) (φ.restrictScalars R)` (over `R`):
```lean
lemma isLocalizedModule_powers_restrictScalars_of_algebraMap
    {R A M N : Type*} [CommRing R] [CommRing A] [Algebra R A]
    [AddCommGroup M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module R M] [Module R N] [Module A M] [Module A N]
    [IsScalarTower R A M] [IsScalarTower R A N] (f : R) (φ : M →ₗ[A] N)
    (h : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R A f)) φ) :
    IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) (φ.restrictScalars R)
```

### 1f. `flat_of_ringHom_comp_bijective` — flatness across a bijective ring-map factorization (base-leg iso)
`GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:1405`. Handles `ψ = φ ∘ ρ` with `ρ` bijective, via `Module.Flat.trans`:
```lean
private theorem flat_of_ringHom_comp_bijective {R R' O M : Type v} [CommRing R]
    [CommRing R'] [CommRing O] [AddCommGroup M] [Module O M] (ρ : R →+* R')
    (hρ : Function.Bijective ρ) (φ : R' →+* O) (ψ : R →+* O) (hψ : ψ = φ.comp ρ)
    (h : letI : Module R' M := Module.compHom M φ; Module.Flat R' M) :
    letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M ψ; Module.Flat R M := by
  subst hψ
  letI : Module R' M := Module.compHom M φ
  letI : Module R M := Module.compHom M (φ.comp ρ)
  letI : Algebra R R' := ρ.toAlgebra
  haveI : Module.Flat R R' := Module.Flat.of_linearEquiv
      ((LinearEquiv.ofBijective (Algebra.linearMap R R') (by rw [hcoe]; exact hρ)).symm)
  haveI : IsScalarTower R R' M := ⟨fun r r' m => by
      change φ (ρ r * r') • m = φ (ρ r) • (φ r' • m); rw [map_mul, mul_smul]⟩
  exact Module.Flat.trans R R' M
```

---

## 2. The canonical `compHom`/`IsScalarTower`/`Flat`-transfer recipe (verbatim template)

The idioms requested in (b)(i)–(iii) appear together most cleanly in `flat_section_chartBasic` (`GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:164`). This is the exact template to imitate:

- **(i) introduce compHom module** — `GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:176,188,198,232,241`:
```lean
letI : Module Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, Wj) := Module.compHom _ (p.appLE U₀ Wj eWj).hom
letI : Module Γ(X, Wj) Γ(F, X.basicOpen β) :=
    Module.compHom _ (algebraMap Γ(X, Wj) Γ(X, X.basicOpen β))
```
- **(i′) the algebra on the ring side** — `:197,243`: `letI : Algebra Γ(S, U₀) Γ(X, Wj) := (p.appLE U₀ Wj eWj).hom.toAlgebra`
- **(ii) IsScalarTower via `of_algebraMap_smul`**, two flavours. Trivial (defeq) `:190,200,245`:
```lean
haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(X, Wj) Γ(X, X.basicOpen β) Γ(F, X.basicOpen β) :=
    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul (fun _ _ => rfl)
```
Non-trivial (needs `appLE_res_apply`), `:202`:
```lean
haveI : IsScalarTower Γ(S, U₀) Γ(X, Wj) Γ(F, X.basicOpen β) :=
    IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul (fun a n => by
      change (X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le β)).op).hom
          ((p.appLE U₀ Wj eWj).hom a) • n
        = (p.appLE U₀ (X.basicOpen β) eβ).hom a • n
      rw [appLE_res_apply p eWj (X.basicOpen_le β) a])
```
- **(iii) transfer `Module.Flat`** across instances — several tools chained `:215–256`:
```lean
haveI hflatLoc : Module.Flat Γ(S, U₀) (LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers g) Γ(F, Wj)) := by
    haveI : Module.Flat (Localization.Away g) (LocalizedModule ...) := inferInstance
    exact (Module.flat_iff_of_isLocalization (Localization.Away g)
      (Submonoid.powers g) (LocalizedModule ...)).mp this
haveI hflatNβ : Module.Flat Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, X.basicOpen β) :=
    Module.Flat.of_linearEquiv
      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers g)
        ((Scheme.Modules.restrictBasicOpenₗ F β).restrictScalars Γ(S, U₀))).symm
...
haveI hflatC' : Module.Flat Γ(S, U₀) Γ(F, X.basicOpen c') :=
    Module.Flat.of_isLocalizedModule_algebra (Submonoid.powers c')
      (Scheme.Modules.restrictBasicOpenₗ F c')
exact flat_sections_congr p F hDc' ec' eO hflatC'
```
Base-ring descent step at `:209`:
```lean
haveI hlocA : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers g)
    ((Scheme.Modules.restrictBasicOpenₗ F β).restrictScalars Γ(S, U₀)) := by
  refine isLocalizedModule_powers_restrictScalars_of_algebraMap g _ ?_
  exact hlocB
```

The **two-base-exchange** finale (used at the end of `flat_section_pair` `:399` and `flat_section_of_affine_cover` `:1008`):
```lean
have h2 : Module.Flat Γ(S, S.basicOpen (aa x)) Γ(F, X.basicOpen r.1) :=
  (Module.flat_iff_of_isLocalization (R := Γ(S, U₀))
    Γ(S, S.basicOpen (aa x)) (Submonoid.powers (aa' x)) Γ(F, X.basicOpen r.1)).mpr hA
exact (Module.flat_iff_of_isLocalization (R := Γ(S, U))
    Γ(S, S.basicOpen (aa x)) (Submonoid.powers (aa x)) Γ(F, X.basicOpen r.1)).mp h2
```
with the two localizations provided by `hU.isLocalization_basicOpen (aa x)` (`:360`) and `hU₀.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen (aa' x) (homOfLE haU₀) (haa' x)` (`:372`), and the span glue `Module.flat_of_isLocalized_span` at `:342`.

`flat_section_pair` (`:269`) and `flat_section_of_affine_cover` (`:861`) are structurally identical twins of this recipe (base=`S`/fibre=`X` vs base=`T`/fibre=`Y`); the latter is the general "cover ⟹ all pairs" affine-locality engine.

## 4. Helper/bridging lemmas naming `appLE` (compositions ↔ `algebraMap`)

- `Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE` (Mathlib) is invoked to fold two `appLE`s into one across a scheme composition, at three load-bearing spots:
  - `flat_section_pullback_piece`, `GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:782`:
    ```lean
    have h1 : iX.appLE US UX hUSX ≫ g.appLE UX (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_left =
        f.appLE US UT hUST ≫ iY.appLE UT (g ⁻¹ᵁ UX ⊓ iY ⁻¹ᵁ UT) inf_le_right := by
      rw [Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE, Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE]
      exact key (g ≫ iX) H.w.symm _ _
    ```
    used to prove the `IsScalarTower` via `of_algebraMap_eq' (by ... exact congrArg CommRingCat.Hom.hom h1)` `:771`.
  - `coherentSheafFlat_of_comp_isIso`, `GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:1450`:
    ```lean
    have hfact : q.appLE U V eV =
        (inv w).appLE U ((inv w) ⁻¹ᵁ U) le_rfl ≫
          (q ≫ w).appLE ((inv w) ⁻¹ᵁ U) V eV' := by
      rw [Scheme.Hom.appLE_comp_appLE]; ... simp only [hmor]
    ```
- `.hom.toAlgebra` on an `appLE` is the universal way the base ring is turned into an algebra so `IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul`/`of_algebraMap_eq'` become available — e.g. `(p.appLE U₀ Wj eWj).hom.toAlgebra` `:197`, `(iX.appLE US UX hUSX).hom.toAlgebra` `:759`, and the composite `((g.appLE …).hom.comp (iX.appLE …).hom).toAlgebra` `:766` (this is what makes the pushout square's diagonal an algebra, matched by `of_algebraMap_eq' rfl`).
- `appLE`↔`algebraMap` identifications used as `rfl`/`show`: e.g. `pointRank_pullback` `:263` `have h5 : algebraMap Γ(X, V) Γ(Y, W) = (g.appLE V W hWle).hom := rfl`; and `IsAffineOpen.comap_primeIdealOf_appLE` `:261`.
- `id_appLE_apply` (`FlatteningStratificationUniversal.lean:150`) is the `appLE`-of-identity bridge (`= r` via `Scheme.id_appLE` + `presheaf_map_self`), the input to `flat_compHom_congr`.
- `appLE_base_res_apply'` at `FlatteningStratificationUniversal.lean:338` (used in `strataData_le_ker` to rewrite `q.app U r` restricted to `W` as `q.appLE`).
